title: Commercial office, Type V-B, plumbing fixtures short for occupant load
notes: First true-positive case for PLUMB-FIXTURES. IPC Table 403.1 Group B ratios are 1 WC / 25 and 1 lav / 40 occupants, so OL 200 requires 8 WC and 5 lav; the plan shows 2 WC and 1 lav. Area/stories/height/exits are clean so the fixture shortfall is isolated. requires_citation=False (table-store provenance), so the fail survives the citation gate.
plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
Occupancy Group: B
Construction Type: V-B
Stories: 1
Building height: 18 ft
Per-story area: 5,000 sf
Fully sprinklered: yes
Design occupant load: 200
IECC: Title 24 Part 6
NFPA 13 sprinkler system.
EXIT 1 (main). EXIT 2 (side).
WC 2 LAV 1.

ground_truth.rationale: OL 200 Group B requires 8 WC / 5 lav (IPC Table 403.1); only 2 WC / 1 lav shown.
5,000 sf within the 9,000 sf allowable for B/V-B
